entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SUNNY IN THE MORNING, THEN PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING NORTH AFTER MIDNIGHT
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
NORTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
